title: Life is Strange Remastered
summary: A classic for a reason. Interesting story and good characters, with a super power twist.
body: If you have a choice just buy the original. Graphics are really a side grade at best and bugs were added that the original doesn't have.

tabs.name: The Good, The Bad, & The Okay
tabs.content:
[h1]The Good[/h1][list]
[*] Great Story
[*] Complex Characters with thought out backgrounds
[*] Unique Hand Crafted Menus and interface prompts
[*] Community Choice Comparisons
[*]Memorable Music
[/list]
[h1]The Bad[/h1][list]
[*]Episodic Releases
[/list]
[h1]The Okay[/h1][list][*] Choices Barely Matter, generally resulted in dialogue changes but not actual story changes. While the character's feelings towards Max were altered the overarching story remained the same except for 2 choices.
[/list]
